metadata.title:
To CONFER ON


n. ?. PROBLEM

MAYOR NAMES CONAN. WEEKS
AND PRATT ON COMMITTEE
AND is LOOKING FOR FIVE
OR TEN MORE.

pages.raw_text:
e. T. Conan. c. II. Weeks and n.
S. Pratt were named by Mayor
Moore today as part of the COM
mittee of business men who, with
city officials, are to try and show
railway officials the ACCESSIBILITY of
a common user right of way
through the city instead of the
present routes. The city council,
following an address in which City
Engineer Ralston unfolded his
scheme, authorized the mayor to
select a committee. The three men
named this morning have signi-
fed their willingness to act, but
the mayor desires to secure five or
10 more.


In the meantime the grade sepa-
ration discussions have been given
up. 1t is improbable that they will
be considered again until the COM
mittee reports
